name: Grilled Lamb Chops Dijon
recipeIngredient: 12 small loin lamb chops, trimmed of fat
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mash the orange zest and thyme together with the back of a spoon.
2. Stir in the mustard and brown sugar. Let stand at room temperature for 1 hour.
3. Preheat the grill.
4. Lightly brush one side of each lamb chop with about 1/4 of the mustard mixture, dividing it evenly.
5. When the fire is hot, place the chops on the rack, mustard side down. Cover and grill for 2 minutes.
6. Brush the chops with another 1/4 of the mustard, turn them over, cover, and grill for another 2 minutes.
7. Brush and turn the chops twice more until the mustard mixture is used up, about 10 minutes for rare or until cooked to your liking.
8. Season with salt and pepper. Makes 4 servings.
